gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 initially requested exact serving-environment profile validation for native-probe factory sidecars; the validator now compares embedded profiles to built-in vLLM/SGLang profile records and has malformed-profile rejection coverage. Re-review approved.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Added native-probe factory diagnostics as an optional release-bundle sidecar with validation and manifest support.
Threaded native-probe factory diagnostics through benchmark-plan release-bundle config and CLI generation.
Updated public and legacy release-bundle CLIs, README examples, and tests.
why: Release handoff bundles should carry the package-owned vLLM/SGLang native factory diagnostics alongside benchmark, storage, governance, wheel, and PR evidence artifacts.
